Legends of Basketball IFRAME MODE

Host page — Bill runs in an isolated iframe. Show/Do reach the host DOM via the shim's postMessage bus. Type into Bill below to drive this page.

Try typing to Bill:

"how do I add a member?" → Show drives this page · "add Sam Jones as Treasurer" → Do fills the form below
